package rulefixtures

import (
	"strconv"
)

// scenario for fmt_sprintf_float_to_string: `fmt.Sprintf("%f", ...)` instead of `strconv.FormatFloat(...)` when only a float string is needed.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario493Negative(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, strconv.Itoa(value))
	}
	return out
}
